intake_record.name: Maria Santos
intake_record.special_needs: Elderly mother (78) also injured, child (8) unaccounted for

action_plan: CRITICAL TRIAGE: Immediate medical evacuation required. Patient shows signs of internal bleeding and respiratory distress. Priority 1: Transport to nearest trauma center with capability for emergency surgery. Activate family reunification protocol for missing child. Contact Spanish-language liaison for patient communication and family support. Provide pain management during transport.

resources.name: Central Hospital Trauma Center
resources.capacity: Critical care available, orthopedic surgery on-call

evidence.content: In emergencies affecting families, prioritize child protection, family unity preservation, and trauma-informed care. Establish reunification protocols within first 24 hours.
Patients with crushing injuries require immediate assessment for compartment syndrome, internal bleeding, and airway compromise. Evacuation to surgical capability is time-critical.
